text.title: Predictive Analytics for PM Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (history_count, data_eng_capability, decision_acceptance_of_intervals) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Historical portfolio ≥ 30 completed projects with structured outcome data?

conclusion.verdict: culture mismatch — fix decision-style before deploying ML
no data-engineering team — maintenance burden too high
corpus too small — ML overfits; use heuristics until corpus grows

text.example: history_count=142 → data_eng_capability=true → decision_accepts_intervals=true → apply full predictive-analytics (rule min-30-projects).
